response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The first song 'Serendipity' matches the reference JSON lyrics perfectly. However, the second song is incorrectly identified as 'Zen Koutei' in the reference JSON, while the actual audio is clearly 'A Cruel Angel's Thesis' (残酷な天使のテーゼ). 2. JSON Usage: Discarded the reference lyrics for 'Zen Koutei' entirely and performed 100% manual transcription and translation of the actual song heard. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitled both the English and Japanese spoken dialogue, English singing, and Japanese singing, ensuring precise boundaries that are perfectly synchronized with the audio.

subtitles.original: You guys know I like harmonies?
subtitles.english: You guys know I like harmonies?

subtitles.original: Yes. So we're gonna split you into different notes, okay?
subtitles.english: Yes. So we're gonna split you into different notes, okay?

subtitles.original: ...and all of you at the top!
subtitles.english: ...and all of you at the top!

subtitles.original: So, we're gonna start off with you guys here.
subtitles.english: So, we're gonna start off with you guys here.

subtitles.original: Yeah. We want you to hold this note:
subtitles.english: Yeah. We want you to hold this note:

subtitles.original: Oh my gosh, we have a choir!
subtitles.english: Oh my gosh, we have a choir!

subtitles.original: We've got to do that more often, that was cool. Yeah!
subtitles.english: We've got to do that more often, that was cool. Yeah!

subtitles.original: I like hearing you all sing for us.
subtitles.english: I like hearing you all sing for us.

subtitles.original: Ah~ Hey, that reminds me of a song, doesn't it? You know, that- that first note? Yeah, yeah, yeah.
subtitles.english: Ah~ Hey, that reminds me of a song, doesn't it? You know, that- that first note? Yeah, yeah, yeah.

subtitles.original: Somehow we met along the way
subtitles.english: Somehow we met along the way

subtitles.original: Now here you are beside me
subtitles.english: Now here you are beside me

subtitles.original: Whoa, that was great, wasn't it?!
subtitles.english: Whoa, that was great, wasn't it?!

subtitles.original: It's wonderful harmonizing with you, and I just want to say...
subtitles.english: It's wonderful harmonizing with you, and I just want to say...

subtitles.original: ...thank you so much for being my friend.
subtitles.english: ...thank you so much for being my friend.

subtitles.original: I got too excited! I got too excited!
subtitles.english: I got too excited! I got too excited!

subtitles.original: I'm just too happy! I'm so happy!
subtitles.english: I'm just too happy! I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: Weee woo wee woo wee woo...
subtitles.english: Weee woo wee woo wee woo...

subtitles.original: Oh, I spammed too fast. There we go.
subtitles.english: Oh, I spammed too fast. There we go.

subtitles.original: 無料配信は、次の曲で最後になります。
subtitles.english: The free stream will end with the next song.

subtitles.original: ライブの続きは、ぜひ配信チケットを買って見てね！
subtitles.english: To see the rest of the live concert, please buy a streaming ticket and watch!

subtitles.original: The YouTube free sneak peek is only until the next song, which is...
subtitles.english: The YouTube free sneak peek is only until the next song, which is...

subtitles.original: If you want to continue watching, click the link in the description and get your tickets now!
subtitles.english: If you want to continue watching, click the link in the description and get your tickets now!

subtitles.original: All right, everybody. After three, we all say Serendipity. Got it?
subtitles.english: All right, everybody. After three, we all say Serendipity. Got it?

subtitles.original: Yeah! Ah, thanks so much! We love you guys so much!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Ah, thanks so much! We love you guys so much!

subtitles.original: All right, here we go! Three, two, one...
subtitles.english: All right, here we go! Three, two, one...

subtitles.original: 少年よ 神話になれ

subtitles.english: ...knocks on the door of your heart,

subtitles.original: 私だけをただ見つめて
subtitles.english: but you only look at me,

subtitles.original: 運命さえまだ知らない
subtitles.english: not even knowing your destiny yet,

subtitles.original: だけどいつか気付くでしょう
遥か未来 めざすための
窓辺からやがて飛び立つ
subtitles.english: will soon fly out from the window.

subtitles.original: ほとばしる熱いパトスで
